titles.title: My Redeemer Is Faithful and True

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: As I looked back On the road that I traveled I see so many times that He's carried me through And if there's one thing That I learned in my life My redeemer is faithful and true, My redeemer is faithful and true.

verse.name: C2
V3
verse.lines: My heart rejoices when I read the promise There is a place I'm preparing for you I know someday I'll see My Lord face to face For my redeemer is faithful and true.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: And in every situation, He has proved His love to me When I lack the understanding He gives more grace to me.
